verbGlossary.ACTIVATES: {source} fires {target} trigger, moving a risk from dormant to active status
verbGlossary.ACCELERATES: {source} causes {target}-side burn rate or consumption metric to increase faster
verbGlossary.ASSIGNED TO: {source} is linked to {target} owner responsible for its completion
verbGlossary.ASSIGNS ACCOUNTABILITY TO: {source} identifies the party accountable for {target} event that materialized
verbGlossary.CALIBRATED BY: {target} framework uses a quality/safety metric to tune probability or severity thresholds
verbGlossary.CLASSIFIES INTO: {source} maps its root cause into the corresponding {target} for tracking
verbGlossary.CLOSES: {source}of a quality finding formally closes the associated residual {target}
verbGlossary.CONTRIBUTES TO: A quality/safety metric or closure event improves the overall {target} mitigation completion rate
verbGlossary.DEGRADES: Slow quality resolution worsens {target} mitigation completion rate
verbGlossary.DETECTED BY: {target} is discovered or surfaced through a quality/safety record type
verbGlossary.DOCUMENTS: {source}record provides formal written evidence of {target} trigger or event
verbGlossary.ELEVATES: A quality/safety finding or trend raises the calculated {target}
verbGlossary.ENACTS: {source} or action plan formally executes a planned {target} response strategy
verbGlossary.ESCALATES: A quality/safety finding increases the severity or urgency of {target} beyond its prior level
verbGlossary.EVIDENCES: {source}record provides concrete proof that {target} category has materialized on the project
verbGlossary.EXPOSES: {source} reveals vulnerability to {target} that was previously latent or underestimated
verbGlossary.IMPLEMENTS: {source}carries out a specific {target} mitigation action in the field
verbGlossary.INCREASES: A quality/safety metric or violation raises the monetary or schedule exposure value of {target}
verbGlossary.INDICATED BY: {target} is made apparent by a pattern of quality/safety formal notices
verbGlossary.INDICATES: {source}that a specific {target} is present or growing
verbGlossary.INFORMS: {source}record or metric provides data that shapes {target} likelihood or severity assessment
verbGlossary.LOGGED IN: {source} is formally entered into {target} register as a tracked risk event
verbGlossary.MATERIALIZES: A quality/safety event represents {target} that has actually occurred (moved from potential to realized)
verbGlossary.MITIGATES: {source}inspection or process directly reduces the probability or impact of {target} category
verbGlossary.MIRRORS: {source} tracks the same underlying phenomenon as the corresponding {target}
verbGlossary.MITIGATED BY: {target} is reduced in probability or impact through a quality/safety process or inspection
verbGlossary.MODERATES: A favorable quality/safety metric lowers or tempers an otherwise elevated {target}
verbGlossary.PROLONGS: Slow resolution time extends the duration that a residual {target} remains open and active
verbGlossary.QUANTIFIES: {source}rate metric puts a numeric value on the level of {target} category
verbGlossary.REDUCES: {source} or test result lowers the residual {target} remaining after response
verbGlossary.REPRESENTS: {source} stands as a concrete instance of residual {target} that persists until resolved
verbGlossary.REQUIRED BY: {source} is mandated by {target} allocation or transfer mechanism
verbGlossary.REVEALS: A quality/safety finding uncovers a previously hidden or underestimated design or coordination {target}
verbGlossary.SIGNALS: A quality/safety metric serves as a leading or lagging indicator of {target} condition
verbGlossary.TRIGGERED BY: {source} is created in response to {target} trigger condition being met
verbGlossary.TRIGGERS REVIEW OF: {source} forces a re-evaluation of insurance or bonding requirements
verbGlossary.VALIDATES ABSENCE OF: {source}inspection confirms that {target} has not materialized for the inspected scope
verbGlossary.VALIDATES AGAINST: A test report verifies materials or systems against the standards required to mitigate {target}
